creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
(In reply to Xin LI from comment #1)
Thank you for your comprehensive feedback. I can see how relying on LDAP for daemon usernames would cause those problems. We only have user accounts in LDAP.

If my scenario is just a corner case, then I'll just maintin my original patch in my local ports tree. I don't believe there's any sense in adding unnecessary bulk to port Makefiles. If you think it would be worthwhile, I would be prepared to have a go at makeing an %%RC_REQUIRE%% variable as you suggest - but only if you think it would be worthwhile.

Thank you again for your feedback.
